stimulus.content: Earth has seven continents: Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Australia, Europe, North America, and South America. Asia is the largest continent by both land area and population.

stem: According to the passage, what makes Asia different from the other six continents?

choices.text: It is the largest in both area and population
It is the only continent surrounded by water
It has the fewest countries of any continent
It is located entirely in the Southern Hemisphere

answer_explanation: The passage states that Asia is the largest continent by both land area and population, making it stand out from the other six continents.
